specific_mechanism: Forensic odontology matches dental records to remains via patterned-feature scoring: each dental feature contributes weighted evidence; threshold-based positive identification
llm_application: LLM output verification by feature-pattern matching: draft model proposes candidate tokens; verifier scores each via weighted-feature comparison against base distribution; accept above threshold.
novelty_claim: No published 2024-2026 LLM work formalizes forensic-science adversarial-coevolution mapping as proposed.
